create-hierarchical-pdf-bookmarks.title: Create Hierarchical PDF Bookmarks with PdfBookmarkEditor
create-hierarchical-pdf-bookmarks.description: Shows how to bind a PDF to PdfBookmarkEditor and add a root bookmark with child chapter bookmarks, forming a hierarchical outline.

import-bookmarks-merge-pdf.title: Import Bookmarks from One PDF into Another
import-bookmarks-merge-pdf.description: Demonstrates exporting bookmarks from a source PDF to XML and importing them into a target PDF, preserving the original order.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-csv.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to CSV
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-csv.description: Shows how to extract all bookmarks from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor and write each bookmark's title, destination page number, and hierarchy level to a CSV file.

update-bookmark-destination-to-page-10.title: Update Bookmark Destination to Page 10
update-bookmark-destination-to-page-10.description: Loads a PDF, extracts its bookmark hierarchy, finds a bookmark by title, changes its destination to page 10, and saves the updated document.

delete-all-bookmarks-from-pdf.title: Delete All Bookmarks from a PDF
delete-all-bookmarks-from-pdf.description: Shows how to remove every bookmark from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor and save the modified document.

delete-bookmark-verify-removal.title: Delete a Bookmark and Verify Removal
delete-bookmark-verify-removal.description: Shows how to remove a specific bookmark from a PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor and then confirm the deletion by extracting the remaining bookmarks.

add-top-level-blue-bookmark-to-first-pag.title: Add Top-Level Blue Bookmark to First Page
add-top-level-blue-bookmark-to-first-pag.description: Demonstrates how to create a top-level bookmark that links to page 1 and set its title color to blue using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor facade.

add-child-bookmarks-to-pdf-chapter.title: Add Child Bookmarks to a PDF Chapter
add-child-bookmarks-to-pdf-chapter.description: Shows how to create a parent bookmark and attach child bookmarks representing subsections within a chapter of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-json.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to Nested JSON
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-json.description: Demonstrates extracting PDF bookmarks with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, converting them into a hierarchical POCO structure, and serializing the hierarchy to a pretty‑printed JSON file.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-xml.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to XML
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF with PdfBookmarkEditor and export its full bookmark hierarchy to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-bookmarks-from-json.title: Import Bookmarks from JSON into a PDF
import-bookmarks-from-json.description: Demonstrates how to read a JSON file containing bookmark definitions, convert them to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Bookmark objects, and add them to an existing PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor.

add-toc-bookmark-to-pdfs-batch.title: Add Table of Contents Bookmark to PDFs in Batch
add-toc-bookmark-to-pdfs-batch.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files and add a top‑level "Table of Contents" bookmark to each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor.

create-validate-pdf-bookmarks.title: Create and Validate PDF Bookmarks
create-validate-pdf-bookmarks.description: Shows how to generate a bookmark for each page using PdfBookmarkEditor and then verify the total bookmark count with ExtractBookmarks.

update-pdf-bookmark-title.title: Update PDF Bookmark Title Using MemoryStream
update-pdf-bookmark-title.description: Shows how to bind a PDF from a byte array with MemoryStream, modify an existing bookmark title, and return the updated PDF as a byte array using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-external-url-bookmarks-to-pdf.title: Add External URL Bookmarks to PDF
add-external-url-bookmarks-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add bookmarks that link to external web URLs in an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

update-pdf-bookmark-titles-to-title-case.title: Update PDF Bookmark Titles to Title Case with Proper Nouns
update-pdf-bookmark-titles-to-title-case.description: Demonstrates how to read PDF bookmarks, convert each title to title case while preserving predefined proper nouns, and save the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

delete-bookmarks-matching-regex.title: Delete Bookmarks Matching a Regex Pattern
delete-bookmarks-matching-regex.description: Shows how to remove PDF bookmarks whose titles match a regular expression using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

collapse-specific-pdf-bookmarks.title: Collapse Specific PDF Bookmarks
collapse-specific-pdf-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates how to collapse selected bookmarks in a PDF by setting their Open property to false using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

adjust-pdf-bookmarks-after-inserting-pag.title: Adjust PDF Bookmarks After Inserting Pages
adjust-pdf-bookmarks-after-inserting-pag.description: Demonstrates inserting blank pages at the beginning of a PDF and updating existing bookmarks to reflect the new page numbers using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-text.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to Text Outline
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-text.description: Demonstrates how to extract the hierarchical bookmarks from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and write them to a plain‑text file with indentation that reflects the bookmark levels.

import-ofd-bookmarks-into-pdf.title: Import OFD Bookmarks into PDF
import-ofd-bookmarks-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load an OFD document, extract its bookmarks, and add them to an existing or newly created PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-bookmark-to-pdf.title: Add JavaScript Bookmark to PDF
add-javascript-bookmark-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PDF bookmark that runs JavaScript code when clicked using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-remove-bookmarks-from-encrypted-pd.title: Batch Remove Bookmarks from Encrypted PDFs
batch-remove-bookmarks-from-encrypted-pd.description: Shows how to open password‑protected PDF files, delete all bookmarks using PdfBookmarkEditor, and save the resulting PDFs to a separate folder in a batch operation.

rename-pdf-bookmarks-using-translation-d.title: Rename PDF Bookmarks Using a Translation Dictionary
rename-pdf-bookmarks-using-translation-d.description: Demonstrates how to rename PDF bookmarks by applying a translation map with Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor. The example loads a PDF, updates bookmark titles, and saves the result.

validate-pdf-bookmarks-against-toc.title: Validate PDF Bookmarks Against Generated TOC
validate-pdf-bookmarks-against-toc.description: Extracts bookmarks from a PDF, builds a simple table of contents by scanning Heading objects on each page, and compares the two to report missing or mismatched entries.

add-bookmarks-for-each-image-in-pdf.title: Add Bookmarks for Each Image in a PDF
add-bookmarks-for-each-image-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF pages, locate images, and create a bookmark for each image using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

set-bookmark-zoom-to-150-percent.title: Set Bookmark Zoom Level to 150% in PDF
set-bookmark-zoom-to-150-percent.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to edit PDF bookmarks so that each bookmark opens the document at a 150% zoom level.

export-bookmarks-to-excel.title: Export Bookmarks to Excel Workbook
export-bookmarks-to-excel.description: Demonstrates extracting PDF bookmarks with PdfBookmarkEditor, arranging title, level, and destination page in a table, and saving the data as an Excel workbook.

import-bookmarks-from-csv.title: Import Bookmarks from CSV into PDF
import-bookmarks-from-csv.description: Shows how to read a CSV file, build a hierarchical Bookmark structure, and add the bookmarks to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

create-bookmark-to-named-destination.title: Create Bookmark to Named Destination in PDF
create-bookmark-to-named-destination.description: Demonstrates how to define a named destination in a PDF and add a bookmark that references it using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

remove-duplicate-bookmarks.title: Remove Duplicate Bookmarks from PDF
remove-duplicate-bookmarks.description: Shows how to extract PDF bookmarks, deduplicate them by title and page number, delete the original bookmarks, and recreate only the unique ones using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-reviewed-bookmark.title: Batch Add "Reviewed" Bookmark to PDFs
batch-add-reviewed-bookmark.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over PDF files in a folder and add a "Reviewed" bookmark pointing to the last page of each document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor facade.

add-colored-bookmarks-to-pdf.title: Add Colored Bookmarks to PDF Sections
add-colored-bookmarks-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to create PDF bookmarks with red or green colors based on whether a section is a warning or informational.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-json__v2.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to JSON
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-json__v2.description: Demonstrates extracting a PDF's bookmark hierarchy with PdfBookmarkEditor, flattening it while preserving level information, and writing the data to a pretty‑printed JSON file.

import-database-records-as-pdf-bookmarks.title: Import Database Records as PDF Bookmarks
import-database-records-as-pdf-bookmarks.description: Shows how to generate an in‑memory PDF and convert each database record into a PdfBookmark using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor, respecting evaluation‑mode limits.
